scripts.install:all: cd backend && bun install && cd ../frontend && bun install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && bun run --watch src/index.ts" "cd frontend && bun run dev"
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && bun run src/db/migrate.ts && bun run src/db/seed.ts
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && rm -f data/seat-reservation.db && bun run src/db/migrate.ts && bun run src/db/seed.ts
